stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 4444, why must the movement of all persons, vehicles and towed aircrafts on the manoeuvring area be controlled by the aerodrome control tower?

options.a: To reduce hazards between aircraft landing, taxiing, or taking off.
options.b: To ensure that emergency vehicles are given priority.
options.c: To avoid damage to aerodrome navigation aids.
options.d: To provide safe vehicular access to aprons.
